title: The Body Shop Shea Body Lotion (1x 200ml), Creamy Moisturiser for Very Dry Skin, 72H Skin-Softening Hydration, Body Lotion, Non-Greasy, Vegan Body Care, Dermatologically Tested
features: Nourishing Moisturiser for Very Dry Skin: This rich body lotion melts into the skin, delivering instant softness and long-lasting hydration. Ideal as a daily moisturiser for dry skin in your body care routine.
Comforting Nutty Scent: Infused with our iconic shea fragrance, this moisturising cream comforts the senses while softening dry skin. A non-greasy formula that feels as good as it smells.
72H Hydration with shea butter: Made with 93% natural-origin ingredients, including shea butter. This hydrating moisturiser leaves very dry skin feeling smoother, more supple and healthy-looking.
How to Use: Massage generously onto towel-dried skin after bathing. Focus on dry or tight areas. A fast-absorbing body moisturiser perfect for skin daily care and nourishment.
Vegan Formula with Ingredients of Natural Origin: Certified by The Vegan Society and made with ingredients of natural origin.
